title: Leaks & Legends! [Cobblemon] (Read Desc.)
description: Adds fake leaks and scrapped Cobblemon to your world.
body:
This datapack adds some new Cobblemon to your world, from infamous fake leaks to forgotten scrapped mons. Currently it adds 2 Cobblemon, Animon and Kage no Mushi. Animon is an evolution of Ditto using a metal coat, while Kage no Mushi can be found uncommonly in forests and commonly in lush caves. More information about them will be posted here soon.

---

As of 2/26/25, Leaks & Legends is officially discontinued in favor of joining forces with SpaceworldMons. While Kage No Mushi will not be available in SpaceworldMons, I've created a remodel that may appear in a future datapack. You can find Animon and more in SpaceworldMon's beta for Pokemon Day tomorrow.
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/spaceworldmons-cobblemon]

This page will remain up for archive purposes.
